activities_projects.title: Character Traits of Surang
activities_projects.objective: Identify the personality traits of the main character
steps: Read the story 'The Tunnel' carefully
Identify the main character Surang
List the qualities that describe Surang
Support each quality with an example from the story
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to analyse characters in a story
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct identification of traits and supporting examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Understanding the Setting
activities_projects.objective: Recognise the importance of setting in storytelling
steps: Read the parts of the story that describe the tunnel and surrounding area
Write down details about the place where the story happens
Discuss how the setting affects the events in the story
Share your ideas with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand how setting influences the story
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of explanation and participation in discussion (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Theme Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Understand the central message of the story
steps: Form pairs with classmates
Discuss what message the story 'The Tunnel' gives to readers
Think about themes such as courage, curiosity, or discovery
Write your group’s conclusion and present it to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to identify themes in literature
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of ideas and participation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Sequence the Story
activities_projects.objective: Understand the order of events in the story
steps: List the main events from the story
Arrange the events in the correct order
Write a short summary using the sequence
Share your summary with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve comprehension and summarising skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct sequence and clear summary (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Role Play: Exploring the Tunnel
steps: Form small groups
Assign roles such as Surang and other characters in the story
Recreate a scene where the tunnel is explored
Perform the scene in front of the class
activities_projects.evaluation: Teamwork, expression, and understanding of the scene (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Builder
steps: Read the story and identify new or difficult words
Write their meanings in your notebook
Use each word in a sentence of your own
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve vocabulary and language usage
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct meanings and sentence usage (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Descriptive Writing
steps: Imagine you are standing near the tunnel in the story
Write a short paragraph describing the surroundings
Include details such as sounds, sights, and feelings
Read your description to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop imagination and descriptive writing
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and clarity in description (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Word Formation Activity
activities_projects.objective: Learn how new words are formed
steps: Find words in the story that have prefixes or suffixes
Write the base word and the prefix or suffix
Explain how the meaning changes
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand word formation and vocabulary development

activities_projects.title: Grammar Practice: Sentence Types
steps: Read sentences from the story
Identify whether they are declarative, interrogative, or exclamatory
Write three examples of each type
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to recognise and construct different sentence types

activities_projects.title: Creative Story Writing
steps: Imagine you discovered a mysterious tunnel
Write a short story about what you find inside
Include a beginning, middle, and ending
Share your story with your teacher
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve creative writing and imagination
activities_projects.evaluation: Story structure, creativity, and grammar (10 marks)
